name: Rocky Mountain Ayre, Inc.
summary: Rocky Mountain Ayre, Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in food and hospitality, manufacturing, medical marijuana, and retail businesses. It operates a restaurant located in Agawam, Massachusetts. The company was formerly known as AyreTrade, Inc. and changed its name to Rocky Mountain Ayre, Inc. in February 2015. Rocky Mountain Ayre, Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Dover, Delaware.
